title: Junior Instructional Designer at VIT University South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at VIT University South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
VIT University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VIT University South Asia Partners:
VIT University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University South Asia Partners!
